headline: Quest Diagnostics Unveils Achievements in Healthcare Access, Employee Engagement and Environmental Sustainability in 2025 Corporate Responsibility Report
summary: Quest Diagnostics (NYSE: DGX), a leader in diagnostic information services, today unveiled its 2025 Corporate Responsibility Report.

headline: GeneDx Names Mark Gardner President to Lead Its Next Phase of Scale and Growth
summary: GAITHERSBURG, Md., June 16, 2026--GeneDx today announced the appointment of Mark Gardner as President, effective June 15, 2026.
